steps.title: Use only the x-term products
steps.content: The question asks for $b$, the coefficient of $x$ in $ax^2+bx+c$. In $$(9x-28)(15x+4),$$ the $x$ term comes only from the cross products.

steps.title: Combine the cross products
steps.content:
$$9x\cdot4=36x$$
$$-28\cdot15x=-420x$$
So the coefficient of $x$ is $$36-420=-384.$$ The answer is -384.
